title: Add initial support for packed array and packed struct assignment patterns

features.name: packed_array_assignment_pattern
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional packed array assigned using the SystemVerilog assignment pattern syntax with quotes

features.name: packed_struct_assignment_pattern
features.description: Code should include a packed struct assigned using the SystemVerilog assignment pattern syntax with quotes
features.snippet: struct packed { byte x; bit [2:0][3:0] y; } x = '{1, '{2, 3, 4}};

features.name: nested_assignment_patterns
features.description: Code should include nested assignment patterns where an assignment pattern appears as an element within another assignment pattern
features.snippet: struct packed { byte x; bit [2:0][3:0] y; } x = '{1, '{2, 3, 4}};

features.name: assignment_pattern_width_context
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern where element values are evaluated in a context defined by the target element type, enabling automatic width expansion or truncation

features.name: assignment_pattern_default_keyword
features.description: Code should include a packed array assignment pattern using the default keyword to specify a default value for unspecified elements
